issues.detail: The skill is vendor-locked to OpenAI Realtime API, limiting compatibility with other AI agents.
The instructions omit error handling for connection failures, authentication errors, and other edge cases.
The examples provide only high-level outlines without concrete code or realistic demonstrations.

scenarios.name: Node.js Realtime voice agent with server VAD and nova voice
scenarios.rationale: Baseline guesses URLs or stitches together STT/TTS pipelines, missing the realtime WebSocket protocol, while treatment uses the documented wss URL, OpenAI-Beta header, session.update with voice nova, server_vad, and pcm16.

scenarios.name: Add function-calling appointment-booking tool to voice agent
scenarios.rationale: Baseline confuses the format with Chat Completions tool_calls, while treatment registers tools via session.update, handles response.function_call_arguments.done, and returns results through conversation.item.create with function_call_output plus response.create.
